Vicky BakeryCatering ContentShoot Proposal

Prepared for Gaby Menendez, Senior Brand Manager, Vicky Bakery Corporate Team
Proposed dates: Monday, July 27 and Tuesday, July 28, 2026 · Draft dated July 23, 2026

Overview

Seven Seasons, Ten Tablescapes

A two day, on site shoot at Vicky Bakery's BOH office, capturing styled catering and tablescape photography across seven seasonal programs, from Spring/Easter brunch through New Year's Eve. Built from the shot list and mood board Vicky Bakery provided on July 23.

Vicky's shot list groups everything under seven seasonal themes, but a few of those themes cover more than one food layout. Fall and Christmas each carry multiple distinct spreads, so the real production count is ten tablescape builds and 38 shots, the baseline the pricing below is built around. This runs as a two day production.

Total38

Each build is shot overhead, at three quarter angle, in closeup, and (where marked) as an action shot of hands reaching for or plating food.

38 is the baseline, not the cap. Expect the final delivered set to run higher, since we typically capture a few frames per angle for selects and variety.

Pricing

The Investment

Catering Content Production
Two Day Shoot, All Ten Builds
$3,000
  • On site photography across both days, all ten tablescape builds, 38 shots baseline
  • Hand model(s) for action shots, sourced by BLANK
  • Full edit, color correction, and retouching on all final images
  • Delivered as an organized digital asset library within 5 to 7 business days of the final shoot day
  • Usage rights included for social, website, and print
  • Two rounds of revisions included, submit all requested changes together in one batch per round
Vicky Bakery provides: the tables and surfaces to style on, tablescape props, linens, seasonal decor and florals, food prepared and ready to plate, and the shoot space. Not included in this quote, please confirm before we lock dates.

Additional revisions beyond the two included rounds are $40 per image.
Add on
Video Coverage
Quoted separately
  • A 15 second horizontal video for each of the ten tablescapes, one per season
  • Horizontal delivery so it works for TV displays, website banners, and other wide placements
  • Shot with vertical cropping in mind, so your team can repurpose the footage for social and other vertical platforms on your own
Add on
Graphics
Quoted separately
  • A designed promotional graphic for each of the ten tablescape builds, one per season
  • Built from the shoot's own photography, with Vicky Bakery's branding and messaging layered in
  • Ready to use for social posts, print menus, or in-store signage

Before we lock dates

One Thing to Confirm

Will Vicky Bakery's team be setting up the tables, tablescapes, and props for each build? Sourcing and styling that isn't included in this quote, so we want to make sure it's covered before the shoot dates are locked in.

Next steps

Getting to a Shoot Date

  1. Gaby confirms table and prop setup, and whether video coverage is of interest.
  2. BLANK sends the contract. 50% is due at signing to reserve the dates.
  3. Shoot proceeds across the two confirmed days. The remaining 50% is due upon completion of the shoot.
  4. Edited images delivered within 5 to 7 business days of the final shoot day.

Questions

Happy to Walk Through Any of This

If anything in this proposal needs more detail or you just want to talk it through, reach out any time. We're looking forward to working together.
